offset_convention: BEAT-BASED: off_ticks @ PPQ 480 (negative = ahead, positive = behind). off_pct_step = % of one grid step; off_approx = nearest note-value fraction. off_ms_at_native_bpm kept for reference only.
swing_convention: swing_16th = MPC-style % applied to odd 16th steps (50=straight, 66=triplet)

patterns.name: When the Levee Breaks (Bonham)
patterns.feel: Hats locked; snare fat & late (+18ms); tempo may breathe live.

patterns.name: Fool in the Rain (Bonham)
patterns.feel: Half-time shuffle (triplet grid). Big snare on 3 laid back; ghosts soft.

patterns.name: Good Times Bad Times (Bonham)
patterns.feel: Kick 16th bursts push on top; snare relaxed.

patterns.name: Fall in Love (Dilla)
patterns.feel: Kicks rush early, snare drags late, in the SAME bar. Repeat identically.

patterns.name: Runnin' (Dilla)
patterns.feel: Swung hats (58%) over a dead-straight kick: two feels at once.

patterns.name: Didn't Cha Know (Dilla)
patterns.feel: Kicks land in the cracks between 16ths; let bass follow the kick.

patterns.name: One Drop (Carlton Barrett)
patterns.feel: Beat 1 EMPTY. Kick+rim together on 3, fat and late. Hats gently swung/back.

patterns.name: Get Up Stand Up (Barrett)
patterns.feel: One drop with rim ghosts + kick pickup into the (still empty) 1.

patterns.name: Exodus steppers (Barrett)
patterns.feel: Four-on-floor reggae, all of it marginally behind.

patterns.name: Classic house
patterns.feel: Open hat exhales on every offbeat; light disco swing on closed 16ths.

patterns.name: Techno
patterns.feel: Zero swing. The grid IS the aesthetic.

patterns.name: Trance
patterns.feel: Blank metronome; motion belongs to the offbeat bassline.

patterns.name: UK garage 2-step
patterns.feel: Heavy shuffle (60-66%); broken kick. Swing setting IS the genre.

patterns.name: Jungle (Amen chop)
patterns.feel: Human micro-offsets from the sampled break: keep the +/- scatter.

patterns.name: Drum & bass two-step
patterns.feel: Jungle's anchors, re-quantized tight.

patterns.name: Funky Drummer (Stubblefield)
patterns.feel: Immaculate 16th hats, whisper swing; ghosts wrap the backbeat.

patterns.name: Amen, Brother (Coleman)
patterns.feel: Everything pushes slightly. Displaced snare on the e-of-3.

patterns.name: Think / About It (Starks)
patterns.feel: Crisp economy; swung 16ths.

patterns.name: Apache (Gordon + bongos)
patterns.feel: Straight kit under loose bongo layer (toms here).

patterns.name: Impeach the President
patterns.feel: The boom-bap lean: everything back, snare fattest.

patterns.name: N.Y. State of Mind (Premier)
patterns.feel: Tight MPC swing; snare like a slammed door.

patterns.name: G Thang (Dre)
patterns.feel: Live-pocket G-funk: sparse, everything a hair behind.

patterns.name: T.R.O.Y. (Pete Rock)
patterns.feel: SP-1200 shuffle, dusty and laid back.

patterns.name: C.R.E.A.M. (RZA)
patterns.feel: Unquantized scatter, both directions. Do NOT clean up.

patterns.name: Are You That Somebody (Timbaland)
patterns.feel: Grid-perfect. Funk from stuttered kicks + silence. Half-time snare.

patterns.name: Grindin' (Neptunes)
patterns.feel: Minimalism as aggression; negative space does the work.

patterns.name: 3-2 son clave + salsa
patterns.feel: Two bars. Clave=rim, cascara=ride, conga slap/open=toms. On top; bass anticipates.

patterns.name: Bembe 6/8 bell
patterns.feel: 12/8 ancestor timeline; deliberately ambiguous downbeat.

patterns.name: Samba batucada
patterns.feel: Caixa 16ths: 2nd/3rd 16ths EARLY (-12ms). Surdo weight on 2 & 4.

patterns.name: Bossa nova
patterns.feel: Two bars. Samba relaxed into a hammock; everything +4ms.

patterns.name: Dembow (reggaeton)
patterns.feel: Tresillo snare on quantized four-on-floor.

patterns.name: Slow blues shuffle
patterns.feel: Full triplet shuffle, deep behind. Snare +30ms.

patterns.name: Lucille (Earl Palmer)
patterns.feel: The flattening: straight 8ths, dead on. Rock is born.

patterns.name: Back in Black (Phil Rudd)
patterns.feel: Machine-even hats; snare a consistent whisker late. No fills.

patterns.name: Blitzkrieg Bop (punk)
patterns.feel: Everything leans forward (-10ms). Optionally add +1bpm per 8 bars.

patterns.name: Master of Puppets style
patterns.feel: 16th double kick welded to grid, zero swing.

patterns.name: Zombie (Tony Allen)
patterns.feel: No backbeat; ghost stream w/ migrating accent. VARY EVERY BAR (see README).

patterns.name: Water No Get Enemy (Allen)
patterns.feel: The simmer: half the notes, same weave, hits loose both ways.

patterns.name: The Next Movement (Questlove)
patterns.feel: Sample mode: flat dynamics, zero variation, muffled kit.

patterns.name: Playa Playa (Questlove + Pino)
patterns.feel: Drums=grid; BASS drags 40-50ms. Remap 'bass' note to a bass patch.

patterns.name: Chicken Grease (drunk mode)
patterns.feel: Dilla by hand: kicks cracked early, snare late, slight bar wobble.

patterns.name: Cold Sweat (Stubblefield)
patterns.feel: THE ONE: beat-1 kick at max velocity. Crisp, on top.

patterns.name: Cissy Strut (Zigaboo)
patterns.feel: THE CRACK: offbeats ~+22ms at 90bpm (~56-58%), and let it drift +/-5ms.

patterns.name: Thank You (Errico + Graham)
patterns.feel: Driving; kick locks with slap bass.

patterns.name: What Is Hip? (Garibaldi)
patterns.feel: Dead center at maximum density; accents move, placement doesn't.

patterns.name: Flash Light (P-Funk)
patterns.feel: Loping behind, huge One, space for the Moog bass.

patterns.name: Kiss (Prince, LM-1)
patterns.feel: Bone-dry grid. The One + silence. No bass at all.

patterns.name: Hey Pocky A-Way (Zigaboo)
patterns.feel: Second line. BIG FOUR: beat-4 kick accented (launchpad to the One).

patterns.name: Just Kissed My Baby (Zigaboo)
patterns.feel: Swampy crack; loop-like by design -- samples perfectly.

patterns.name: Come Together (Ringo)
patterns.feel: Swampy, behind; end-of-bar fill drags progressively later.

patterns.name: Honky Tonk Women (Watts)
patterns.feel: HAT LIFTED on 2 & 4 (no hat under snare). Snare back; guitar rushes.

patterns.name: Al Jackson Jr pocket (Stax)
patterns.feel: The deepest pocket: snare +30ms and sparse. Do not decorate.

patterns.name: Rosanna (Porcaro)
patterns.feel: Half-time shuffle, densest ghost lattice, dead center.

patterns.name: Won't Get Fooled Again (Moon)
patterns.feel: Surging chaos; give the timekeeping to the bassline.

patterns.name: Walking on the Moon (Copeland)
patterns.feel: Front edge everywhere; rim clicks; reggae-sized space.

patterns.name: Feathered four (Papa Jo, 1938)
patterns.feel: Kick on all four at velocity ~25: felt, not heard.

patterns.name: Motown stomp
patterns.feel: Kick+snare+tambourine on ALL four, leaning forward.

patterns.name: Disco (Earl Young)
patterns.feel: Live silk: swung 16ths, everything sits back a touch.

patterns.name: Deep house
patterns.feel: Rigid floor, drowsy ceiling: shaker drags hard.

patterns.name: Filter house (the pump)
patterns.feel: Feel from DYNAMICS: hat velocity ramps 30->105 within each beat (sidechain).

patterns.name: Dance-punk (DFA)
patterns.feel: Disco's four with punk's clenched-teeth lean.

patterns.name: Rock Steady (Purdie)
patterns.feel: Ghost mist around centered accents; hat barks as punctuation.

patterns.name: Home at Last (the Purdie shuffle)
patterns.feel: Triplet grid. Ghosts on middle partials; ONE big snare on 3, dead center.

patterns.name: Right Time (Sly & Robbie)
patterns.feel: Rockers: militant four; BASS sags 40ms behind. The gap is the sound.

patterns.name: Sponji Reggae (Sly & Robbie)
patterns.feel: Syndrum era (toms = electronic accents); drums tighten, bass sags deeper.

patterns.name: Pull Up to the Bumper (Sly & Robbie)
patterns.feel: Compass Point: near-grid drums, busy bass still +25ms behind.

patterns.name: Murder She Wrote (bam bam)
patterns.feel: Digital dancehall: tresillo snare, everything quantized; Robbie-shaped bass DNA.
